reviews.comment:
Desde que lo renovaron hace un par de años mejoró mucho. Casi al nivel de la Shell de enfrente. Ojo! El drugstore no atiende las 24 hs!!!

(Translated by Google)
Since it was renovated a couple of years ago, it's improved a lot. Almost at the level of the Shell across the street. Be careful! The drugstore isn't open 24 hours a day!
